title: × osmuntonia nipponica
side_effects: × osmuntonia nipponica can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and vomiting, due to its toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to its leaves or stems may also lead to skin irritation, rashes, and allergic reactions in some individuals. In severe cases, improper consumption of × osmuntonia nipponica can result in respiratory problems, such as coughing and shortness of breath, especially in people with pre-existing respiratory conditions. Additionally, its improper use can cause headaches, dizziness, and other neurological symptoms in some users.
